title: Tlabungah oil palm hralh tur vai liam a ni
content:
131/2026-2027Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 11:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Agriculture Office buatsaihin Tlabungah Oil Palm hralh chhuah tur vai liamna (flag off) hun hman a ni a. Lunglei District Agriculture Officer Dr Samuel Laliansanga chuan kum 2026-a Tlabung chhehvela oil palm thar hmasak ber hralh chhuah tur chu a vai liam.

Oil palm hralh tura thawn chhuah hi kilogram 4,175 niin, oil palm chingtu chhungkaw pakaw ta a ni.

Oil palm vai liamnaah hian Tlabunga oil palm chingtute, Agriculture & Farmers Welfare Department-a thawktute leh Partner Company Patanjali Foods Ltd ai awhte an tel a. Tlabung Block huam chhunga oil palm chin leh hralh chhuah chungchanga hma lak zel dan tur leh hmasawnna tur hrang hrang ruahmanna te an sawi ho nghal bawk.

Tlabung Block huam chhungah hian oil palm chingtu chhungkaw 80 vel awmin, ram hectare 150 vela zauvah oil palm hi an ching a. Tlabung, Tipperaghat leh Khojoysuri khuaah te oil palm hi an ching mek a ni.

Agriculture Department chuan kut hna thawktute hnenah oil palm ṭiak (seedling) hi an sem ṭhin a. A chinna senso hrang hrang – a hmun enkawlna, half moon terrace laihna, leilawn leh a sengna harvesting pole te chu oil palm farmer-te hnenah hian pek ṭhin a ni bawk.

Oil palm hralhna chungchangah Agriculture Department leh Patanjali Foods Ltd Company te chu thawk hovin, Company hian oil palm rah, 'Fresh Fruit Bunch (FFB)' hi an lei ṭhin a. Tun dinhmunah chuan Bukvanneia Godrej Company te Oil Palm Mill-ah an la hralh chhawng rih a. Lawngtlai District-a Liapha khuaah Patanjali Company hian Oil Palm Mill buatsaih mekin, kumin 2026 hian hawn theih a nih besei a ni.

Attachment

title: KHAWZAWL DISTRICT WRESTLING ASSOCIATION HAWNNA NEIH A NI
content:
130/2026-2027

Khawzawl, 11 April :Vawiin chhun dar 1:00 khan Khawzawl Zaingen YMA Hall ah Khawzawl District Wrestling hawnna neih ani a. Pu R. Lalrinhlua Sub Deputy & District Sports & Youth Officer (DSYO) leh Khawzawl District Sports Committee Secretary ni bawk chu khuallian a ni a, MWA President Ngurthansanga chuan Khawzawl District Wrestling Association hawnna a nei bawk.

Khuallian, Pu R. Lalrinhlua MSC, Sub Deputy Commissioner (SDC) and District Sports & Youth Officer (DSYO) Secretary ni bawk chuan, thu sawiin, Khawzawl District Wrestling Association din a ni ta chu lawmawm tiin duhsakna sang ber a hlan thu a sawi a. Infiamna sports in a ken tel chu ei leh in a fimkhur a ni. infiammi hlawhtling chuan zu leh ruihhlo lakah a fihlim thin, a ti a. ⁠Infiamna hi mihring taksa tan a tha a, infiamnain a ken tel tlat chu ngawrh taksa sawizawi hi a ni a. Eng infiamna pawh hi regular exercise ngai vek a, taksa kan swizawi hi kan taksa hian a lo ngeih hle a. Sports infiamna hian taksa rilru leh ngaihtuahna thlarau thlengin hriselna a thlen a, hei vang hian mihring te hriselna atan hian infiamna hi damdawi tha ber a ni, a ti bawk.

Khawzawl District chhungah Sports Association hrang hrang 17 vel a awm a. Annual Program duante hmangin chhawmdawlna dawn thin ani, a ti bawk.

Khawzawl Dist Wrestling Association hawngtu, MWA President Ngurthansanga pawhin thu sawiin Mizoram Wrestling Association (MWA) leh Khawzawl District ten ni chhinchhiah thlak a nei chu alawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Wrestling hi Mizoram States Sports Council hnuaiah dan anga inziak lut Association upa pawl tak ni tawhin, Wrestling Federation of India ah pawh affiliation nei kan ni a. Wresler's tha leh ti peihte tan Olympic thlenga kalkawng mumal tak neisa vek a ni, a ti a.

Mizoramah pawh District hrang hrangah inzarpharhin District tinah hian Club tha tak tak engmawzat din an ni bawk a. Chung atang chuan kumtin State chhungah championship chi hrang hrang kan nei thinin, chung atanga a ti thate chu National khel turin kan intir liam thin a ti.

MWA President chuan, hruaitute kan ni emaw, Wresler kan ni emaw, taksa ti chhetu, chhungkaw tibuai a, ram leh hnam ti mualpho thintu Ruihhlo laka fihlim ang u. a Ruihtheih thil nen chuan thui kan kal thei dawnlo tih i hrethar ang u, a ti bawk.

Report petu, MWA General Secretary Lalrochhuanga Colney chuan, Mizoramah Wrestling Association pariat a awm tawh tih sawiin, MWA danpui chi hrang hrang 24 hnuaia inrelbawl a nih thu a sawi a. Indian mite Bana kaih, Empowering Mizoram Sports hnuaiah Coach dil thuai turin a ti a. Kum 2036 a India ramin Olympic Games a thlen tumah hmabak phurawm tak kan neih thu a sawi.

Khawzawl District Wrestling Association hawnna inkhawm hi Pu R. Lalhunmawia, KDWA President chuan kai hruaiin, Pu Vanlalruata Vice President MWA chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a ni.

Attachment

title: MINISTER PU VANLALHLANA'N CHAMPHAI, MUALKAWI, MELBUK LEH ZOKHAWRTHAR INKALPAWHNA KAWNG SIAM THAT TUR A ENFIAH
content:
129/2026-2027

Champhai, dated 11th April 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu Vanlalhlana, PWD Minister chuan Champhai, Mualkawi, Melbuk leh Zokhawthar inkalpawhna kawng siamthat tur a hmunah kalin a enfiah a, PWD Department hotu E-In-C, Chief Engineer-te leh Technical Officer-ten an tawiawm a ni.

Highway kawnghluiin a paltlang siam thatna tur One Time Improvement (OTI) atan hian Nuaih 985 (₹985 lakhs) sanction a ni a. He hna hian Champhai khawchhung Kanan Veng atanga New Champhai Zotlang inkar bakah Mualkawi, Melbuk, leh Zokhawthar khawchhung kawngte a huam dawn a ni. He kawng, a tira Km 17.45-a thui hi Black top chhah tha tak (BC=40mm) hmanga siam tur a ni a, tunah hian Tender buaipui mek a ni.

Hemi bakah hian, Khankawn atanga Zokhawthar inkar, 2-lane highway awmsa enkawl zui (Performance Based Maintenance Contract - PBMC) hna thawhna tur hian Nuaih 2,895 (₹2,895 lakhs) sanction a ni bawk. He hna atan hian Tender chhuah tawh niin, tun thla ni 30 hian Technical Bid hawn a ni ang. He hnathawh tur hian kawng chhe lai hnawh phui (Initial rectification), Road sign leh Protection wall siam, leh kawng tluana Blacktop thar (Periodic Maintenance) te a huam a ni.

He hmalakna hnuaiah hian kawng siam bakah kum 5 chhung enkawl zui (Routine Maintenance) hna leh leimin thenfai (Emergency works) hnate pawh a tel vek dawn a. He hmalakna hian Champhai leh Zokhawthar inkar inkalpawhna a ti hmasawn hle tura beisei a ni.
